case_title: LAN LE VS. YAEL BIRNBERG et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LE, LAN AS TO DEFENDANT BIRNBERG, YAEL DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
